tagline: UK-based supplier of high-reliability connectors and cable assemblies for aerospace, defense, and industrial applications. Core product families include Kona (8.5mm power connectors to 60A), Datamate series (2–4mm signal and mixed-power connectors with jackscrew or latch retention), and configurable hi-rel cable assemblies. Production-ready across all lines. NDAA compliance status and Blue UAS certification status unknown; public evidence of defense/aerospace adoption exists but lacks official program attribution.
